Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Epoxy Flooring to get the job done right.

“Our 1962 rambler's garage floor had massive salt damage from 40 Minnesota winters. Summit's team removed the spalled concrete and installed a quartz-filled epoxy that looks brand new after two brutal winters. The cove base has completely stopped meltwater from seeping into our basement walls.”

Mark T. Residential Garage Floors
Feb 14, 2025

“I wanted something special for my North Loop loft's sunroom. The artisans created a swirling copper/iron design that changes with sunlight throughout the day. Even in January when it's -10°F outside, the floor stays warm with our radiant heat and shows zero cracks.”

Anika R. Decorative Metallic Epoxy
Mar 22, 2025

“Our Plymouth driveway looked like a war zone after the 2023 ice storms. Summit's infrared scan found voids we didn't know existed. The polymer overlay matched our existing broom finish perfectly and their expansion joint placement has prevented new cracks despite temperature swings.”

David & Susan L. Concrete Repair & Resurfacing
Jan 5, 2025

“Our Bloomington clinic's entryway was a constant slip hazard during winter. Summit installed their aluminum oxide system with subtle blue color coding for safe pathways. The textured zones are invisible but provide incredible traction - no more wet floor signs during flu season!”

Twin Cities Pediatrics Anti-Slip Floor Systems
Nov 30, 2024

“Had Summit epoxy our Maple Grove garage after adding radiant heat. The floor now warms up in 30 minutes instead of 2 hours, and our cars stay cleaner since snow melts off before dripping salt. The thermal imaging report showed perfect heat distribution across all zones.”

James K. Radiant Heat Compatible Floors
Dec 18, 2024

“As contractors who renovate old Minneapolis homes, we trust Summit for all our basement floors. Their moisture-testing protocol caught a vapor issue in a 1915 Craftsman that other coatings would have failed on. Two years later, not a single bubble or peel despite lake humidity.”

Lakeside Renovations Commercial Epoxy Systems
Apr 2, 2025
Summit Epoxy Flooring

Trusted epoxy flooring professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-epo-r91
